1.arabic: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم إنا أرسلنا نوحا إلى قومه أن أنذر قومك من قبل أن يأتيهم عذاب أليم
1.english: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."
1.transliteration: Innaaa arsalnaa Noohan ilaa qawmihee an anzir qawmaka min qabli any yaatiyahum 'azaabun aleem

1.arabic: قال يا قوم إني لكم نذير مبين
1.english: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner,
1.transliteration: Qaala yaa qawmi innee lakum nazeerum mubeen

1.arabic: أن اعبدوا الله واتقوه وأطيعون
1.english: [Saying], 'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.
1.transliteration: Ani'udul laaha watta qoohu wa atee'oon

1.arabic: يغفر لكم من ذنوبكم ويؤخركم إلى أجل مسمى ۚ إن أجل الله إذا جاء لا يؤخر ۖ لو كنتم تعلمون
1.english: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.' "
1.transliteration: Yaghfir lakum min zunoobikum wa yu'akhkhirkum ilaaa ajalim musammaa; innaa ajalal laahi izaa jaaa'a laa yu'akhkhar; law kuntum ta'lamoon

1.arabic: قال رب إني دعوت قومي ليلا ونهارا
1.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.
1.transliteration: Qaala rabbi innee da'awtu qawmee lailanw wa naharaa

1.arabic: فلم يزدهم دعائي إلا فرارا
1.english: But my invitation increased them not except in flight.
1.transliteration: Falam yazid hum du'aaa 'eee illaa firaaraa

1.arabic: وإني كلما دعوتهم لتغفر لهم جعلوا أصابعهم في آذانهم واستغشوا ثيابهم وأصروا واستكبروا استكبارا
1.english: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.
1.transliteration: Wa inee kullamaa da'awtuhum litaghfira lahum ja'alooo asaabi'ahum fee aazaanihim wastaghshaw siyaabahum wa asaarroo wastakbarus tikbaaraa

1.arabic: ثم إني دعوتهم جهارا
1.english: Then I invited them publicly.
1.transliteration: Summa innee da'aw tuhum jihaara

1.arabic: ثم إني أعلنت لهم وأسررت لهم إسرارا
1.english: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
1.transliteration: Summaa inneee a'lantu lahum wa asrartu lahum israaraa

1.arabic: فقلت استغفروا ربكم إنه كان غفارا
1.english: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
1.transliteration: Faqultus taghfiroo Rabakam innahoo kaana Ghaffaaraa

1.arabic: يرسل السماء عليكم مدرارا
1.english: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
1.transliteration: Yursilis samaaa'a 'alaikum midraaraa

1.arabic: ويمددكم بأموال وبنين ويجعل لكم جنات ويجعل لكم أنهارا
1.english: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.
1.transliteration: Wa yumdidkum bi am waalinw wa baneena wa yaj'al lakum Jannaatinw wa yaj'al lakum anhaaraa

1.arabic: ما لكم لا ترجون لله وقارا
1.english: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
1.transliteration: Maa lakum laa tarjoona lillaahi waqaaraa

1.arabic: وقد خلقكم أطوارا
1.english: While He has created you in stages?
1.transliteration: Wa qad khalaqakum at waaraa

1.arabic: ألم تروا كيف خلق الله سبع سماوات طباقا
1.english: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
1.transliteration: Alam taraw kaifa khalaqal laahu sab'a samaawaatin tibaaqaa

1.arabic: وجعل القمر فيهن نورا وجعل الشمس سراجا
1.english: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?
1.transliteration: Wa ja'alal qamara feehinna nooranw wa ja'alash shamsa siraajaa

1.arabic: والله أنبتكم من الأرض نباتا
1.english: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.
1.transliteration: Wallaahu ambatakum minal ardi nabaataa

1.arabic: ثم يعيدكم فيها ويخرجكم إخراجا
1.english: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.
1.transliteration: Summa yu'eedukum feehaa wa ukhrijukum ikhraajaa

1.arabic: والله جعل لكم الأرض بساطا
1.english: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
1.transliteration: Wallaahu ja'ala lakumul arda bisaataa

1.arabic: لتسلكوا منها سبلا فجاجا
1.english: That you may follow therein roads of passage.' "
1.transliteration: Litaslukoo minhaa subulan fijaajaa

1.arabic: قال نوح رب إنهم عصوني واتبعوا من لم يزده ماله وولده إلا خسارا
1.english: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.
1.transliteration: Qaala Noohur Robbi innahum 'asawnee wattaba'oo mal lam yazid hu maaluhoo wa waladuhooo illaa khasaara

1.arabic: ومكروا مكرا كبارا
1.english: And they conspired an immense conspiracy.
1.transliteration: Wa makaroo makran kubbaaraa

1.arabic: وقالوا لا تذرن آلهتكم ولا تذرن ودا ولا سواعا ولا يغوث ويعوق ونسرا
1.english: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr.
1.transliteration: Wa qaaloo laa tazarunna aalihatakum wa laa tazarunna Waddanw wa laa Suwaa'anw wa laa Yaghoosa wa Ya'ooqa wa Nasraa

1.arabic: وقد أضلوا كثيرا ۖ ولا تزد الظالمين إلا ضلالا
1.english: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."
1.transliteration: Wa qad adalloo kasee ranw wa laa tazidiz zaalimeena illaa dalaalaa

1.arabic: مما خطيئاتهم أغرقوا فأدخلوا نارا فلم يجدوا لهم من دون الله أنصارا
1.english: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.
1.transliteration: Mimmaa khateee' aatihim ughriqoo fa udkhiloo Naaran falam yajidoo lahum min doonil laahi ansaaraa

1.arabic: وقال نوح رب لا تذر على الأرض من الكافرين ديارا
1.english: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.
1.transliteration: Wa qaala Noohur Rabbi laa tazar 'alal ardi minal kaafireena daiyaaraa

1.arabic: إنك إن تذرهم يضلوا عبادك ولا يلدوا إلا فاجرا كفارا
1.english: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.
1.transliteration: Innaka in tazarhum yudil loo 'ibaadaka wa laa yalidooo illaa faajiran kaffaaraa

1.arabic: رب اغفر لي ولوالدي ولمن دخل بيتي مؤمنا وللمؤمنين والمؤمنات ولا تزد الظالمين إلا تبارا
1.english: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
1.transliteration: Rabbigh fir lee wa liwaa lidaiya wa liman dakhala baitiya mu'minanw wa lil mu'mineena wal mu'minaati wa laa tazidiz zaalimeena illaa tabaaraa
